data.author: Jordan Hart
data.title: Get ready for fewer sales: Lululemon has a new 'obsession' with full price and minimal discounting
data.description: Lululemon plans to reduce markdowns in 2026 to boost full-price sales, following revenue challenges in the Americas region.
data.content:
Lululemon is cutting back on sales.Peter Dazeley/Getty Images
  • Lululemon announced plans to boost full-price sales by reducing markdowns.
